# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: service-a
    url: http://service-a.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service-a
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 1000
  - name: service-b
    url: http://service-b.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service-b
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 50
              hour: 500
  - name: service-c
    url: http://service-c.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/service-c
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 200
              hour: 2000

plugins:
  - name: basic-auth
    services:
      - service-a
      - service-b
      - service-c
  - name: acl
    services:
      - service-a
      - service-b
      - service-c
    config:
      whitelist:
        - "trusted-user"
